{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.vue"]
}

# Stage 1: Build
FROM node:20-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

# Stage 2: Serve
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
npm ci
npx vitest run --reporter=verbose

# {projectName}

A modern web application built with **Vue 3**, **TypeScript**, and **Vite**.

## Tech Stack

- Vue 3 (Composition API)
- TypeScript
- Vite
- Vue Router
- Vitest + @vue/test-utils (unit testing)
- Docker + Nginx (production deployment)

## Docker Quick Start

```bash
docker compose up --build
```

The app will be available at [http://<HOST>](http://<HOST>).

## Manual Setup

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm ci

# Start dev server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Preview production build
npm run preview
```

## Running Tests

```bash
# Unit tests
npm test

# Or use the helper script
bash run_tests.sh
```

## Project Structure

```
{projectName}/
├── src/
│   ├── assets/
│   ├── components/
│   ├── router/
│   ├── stores/
│   ├── views/
│   │   └── Home.vue
│   ├── App.vue
│   ├── main.ts
│   └── vite-env.d.ts
├── unit_tests/
│   └── Home.test.ts
├── API_tests/
│   └── e2e.test.ts
├── public/
├── Dockerfile
├── docker-compose.yml
├── nginx.conf
├── index.html
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── vite.config.ts
├── run_tests.sh
└── README.md
```
